title: 2025/09/18 - PP
description: Thursday, 18 September 2025 | Primary Production Petition Committee of Ian Sizer: Madagascar Ragwort – A growing concern for Northland and the rest of New Zealand Hearing of evidence Northland Regional Council - Geoff Crawford, Chair - Jack Craw, Councillor - Chair Biosecurity & Biodiversity Working Party - Joe Carr, Councillor - John Blackwell, Councillor - Don McKenzie, Biosecurity Group Manager - Jonathan Gibbard, Chief Executive Officer - Joanna Barr, Biosecurity Manager
descriptionSummary: Primary Production. of Ian Sizer: Madagascar Ragwort – A growing concern for Northland and the rest of New Zealand. Northland Regional Council
